title: Additional facility wayfinding inventories (clinic/shelter/school/transit)
context: M1 delivers a wayfinding inventory for one facility type (batch-002). This backlog task extends wayfinding coverage to additional facility types — clinic, shelter, school, and transit — based on partner demand. Each facility type has distinct zone layouts, service types, and directional needs. The task is unscheduled and activated per-partner demand; if a partner requests a specific facility type, the relevant inventory is scoped and batched. All symbols follow the same quality bar as batch-002.
objective: Draw, lint, comprehension-test, culturally-review, and export wayfinding symbol inventories for additional facility types (clinic, shelter, school, transit) as demand is confirmed by partners or users.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one additional facility type's complete wayfinding inventory is drawn and tested; the facility type is documented and linked to a confirmed partner or user demand.
All symbols are original vector geometry with originality attestation; RTL/mirror directional variants produced for directional symbols; all pass the style-lint gate and CI build.
Each shipped symbol has a recorded comprehensionScore at ≥67% correct comprehension with the target population for the facility type; below-threshold symbols are redesigned and retested or withheld.
Cultural review completed for all people/place/gesture symbols; metadata and provenance records complete; no license or originality violations.
Each facility-type inventory is published as a clearly scoped dataset with a documented facility type, use context, and partner/demand source.
output: symbols/wayfinding/<facility-type>/ (original SVGs), metadata/ (JSON records with comprehension scores), and CI-generated exports; all CC-BY-4.0. PR opened against main per facility-type batch.
